name: dome
hints: A dome with a gem. Look around carefully - there's more here than meets the eye.
GET GEM. Try LOOK BASE to search the base of the dome for hidden items.
GET GEM (treasure). LOOK BASE drops your held item but reveals something hidden at the dome's base. EAST goes to the tunnel (room 5).
Collect the gem. LOOK BASE to find a hidden item (warning: drops what you're holding). EAST exits to the tunnel.
notes: Dome with *Gem* treasure. LOOK BASE drops held item but finds something hidden. EAST goes to tunnel (room 5).
